from typing import List

def minTimeToExecuteAllTasks(processorTime: List[int], tasks: List[int]) -> int:
    # Sort processors by their available time (ascending)
    processorTime.sort()
    # Sort tasks by their duration (ascending)
    tasks.sort()
    
    n = len(processorTime)
    # Each processor gets 4 tasks
    # To minimize the maximum finish time, assign the longest tasks to the earliest available processors
    # For processor i (0-indexed after sorting), assign the 4 largest remaining tasks
    # The largest tasks are at the end of the sorted tasks list
    max_time = 0

        # taking them in reverse order of processors
        # Processor i gets tasks at indices: 4*n - 4*(i+1) to 4
